headline: Assessing Altria Group (MO) Valuation After Strong Q1, CEO Transition And Dividend Declaration
summary: Altria Group (MO) has given investors several fresh data points to consider, including a regular quarterly dividend of $1.06 per share and a leadership change following its 2026 Annual Meeting of Shareholders. See our latest analysis for Altria Group. Recent price action has been strong, with a 7-day share price return of 7.3% and a 30-day return of 13.46%. The 1-year total shareholder return of 32.84% and 5-year total shareholder return of 115.69% indicate momentum has been building over...
